# Raphael El Mouallem

> Software Engineer — Full Stack & AI Developer, based in Lebanon.

Raphael builds across the stack — React frontends, Spring Boot backends, and PyTorch models trained from scratch. He works on problems at the intersection of systems, AI, and design.

This site (raphaelmouallem.github.io) is a handbuilt 3D portfolio experience built with React Three Fiber. Visitors scroll through a procedurally generated sky and underwater scene; content is presented in cards along the way.

## Background

- Pursuing a Master's in Web Development (2025–present), preceded by a Master's in Computer Science and a Bachelor's in Computer Science.
- Languages spoken: Arabic (native), English (fluent), French (proficient).

## Projects

- **Nexus** — Enterprise RAG knowledge system. Hybrid semantic + lexical search, local (Ollama) and cloud (Gemini) inference, Angular web + Flutter mobile, Dockerized.
- **Custom GPT-2 mini** — Decoder-based LLM built from scratch in PyTorch (12-head self-attention, RoPE), optimized for Apple MPS, quantized for inference.
- **E-Commerce** — Full-stack app: React + Tailwind frontend, Spring Boot backend, PostgreSQL/Flyway.
- **Fitness App** — Cross-platform Flutter fitness app with TTS guidance and encrypted local storage.
- **Finance Tracker** — Angular + Django budget/expense manager with statistical dashboards and XLSX import.

## Contact
